What We Offer

Facilities & Experiences

🎬
Open Air Theater

Experience dining and entertainment under the stars in our dedicated open-air theater. With tiered seating, professional sound & lighting, and a striking screen setup, it's the perfect stage for film screenings, cultural evenings, live performances, and grand celebrations under the open sky.

👥 Up to 300 guests 🎙️ Pro sound system 💡 Stage lighting
Al FrescoEvents & ScreeningsOpen SkyLive Performances
🏨
Service Apartments

Stay close to the magic with our well-appointed service apartments. Fully furnished with modern amenities, daily housekeeping, and complimentary breakfast — ideal for out-of-town guests, extended stays, or corporate travellers looking for comfort beyond a hotel room.

🛏️ King & twin options ☕ Complimentary breakfast
Fully ServicedExtended StayCorporate Ready
🌿
Garden Banquet Hall

A lush, open-air garden setting framed by manicured greenery and warm ambient lighting. Ideal for weddings, receptions, large family gatherings, and milestone celebrations — our garden banquet hall offers a naturally beautiful backdrop that needs little embellishment.

👥 Up to 500 guests 🌳 Garden setting
Large CapacityGarden SettingWeddings
❄️
Mini AC Hall

An intimate, fully air-conditioned hall designed for focused corporate meetings, private dining, and smaller celebrations. Equipped with AV projector, whiteboard, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a dedicated service team — everything you need for a productive or memorable private event.

👥 20–80 guests 📽️ AV & projector 📶 High-speed Wi-Fi
Air ConditionedPrivate & IntimateCorporate
🏊
Pool Side Lawn

Unwind and celebrate alongside our serene swimming pool. The pool side lawn delivers a genuine resort-like atmosphere — perfect for cocktail evenings, sundowner parties, casual get-togethers, themed dinners, and open-air dining with a cool, breezy backdrop.

🏊 Full-size pool view 🌅 Sundowner events
Pool ViewResort VibeCocktail Evenings

Our Story

Rooted in Salem's
Culinary Heritage

Founded in 2009 by Chef Murugan Pillai, Varsity Kitchen grew from a belief that authentic Tamil cooking deserves a space that honours its complexity. We source fresh produce daily from Salem's Shevapet and Suramangalam markets.

Nothing is frozen, nothing is hurried. Our masalas are stone-ground each morning, our broths slow-simmered for hours. The result is food that carries the patience of a grandmother's kitchen.

🌿
Locally Sourced
Fresh from Salem's markets — daily, without exception.
🔥
Wood-Fire Craft
Slow-cook and open flame techniques for genuine depth.
🫙
Fresh Ground Spices
Stone-ground masalas prepared fresh every morning.
🏆
Award Winning
Best Restaurant Salem 2022 & 2023. Hindu Food Guide.

"I cook the way my grandmother taught me — with patience, with respect for every ingredient, and with the belief that the soul of Tamil Nadu lives in its food."

— Chef Murugan Pillai, Founder
15yr In Salem
3 Awards
80+ Dishes
Our Signature

What Makes Us Special

❧
A Sanctuary for the Senses

Nestled within a lush, serene landscape — a unique escape where nature and indulgence coexist, perfect for locals and travellers alike.

✦
Culinary Excellence

Quality is our north star. Every dish is fresh, safe, and extraordinary — a journey through Heritage Indian, Indo-Thai & Indo-Chinese flavors.

◉
A Global Vision

With nearly two decades in Salem, De Varsity Club now looks toward the horizon — taking our signature hospitality to the global stage.
